# Beckhoff.TwinCAT.HMI.BaseTemplate

This package provides a base template for TwinCAT HMI applications, offering a starting point for custom HMI projects.

## Usage

Add `Beckhoff.TwinCAT.HMI.BaseTemplate ` to your TwinCAT HMI project to quickly set up a standardized layout and structure for your application.

## Documentation

For detailed usage and configuration, refer to the [Beckhoff TwinCAT HMI documentation](https://infosys.beckhoff.de/content/1033/te2000_tc3_hmi_engineering/index.html).
